trans-unit.source: Invalid test application builder type. Expected 'TestApplicationBuilder'.
trans-unit.target: Invalid test application builder type. Expected 'TestApplicationBuilder'.

trans-unit.source: The JUnit report file '{0}' already exists and will be overwritten.
trans-unit.target: The JUnit report file '{0}' already exists and will be overwritten.

trans-unit.source: '--report-junit-filename' file name argument must end with '.xml' (e.g. --report-junit-filename myreport.xml)
trans-unit.target: '--report-junit-filename' file name argument must end with '.xml' (e.g. --report-junit-filename myreport.xml)

trans-unit.source: '--report-junit-filename' file name part must not be empty (e.g. --report-junit-filename myreport.xml)
trans-unit.target: '--report-junit-filename' file name part must not be empty (e.g. --report-junit-filename myreport.xml)

trans-unit.source: The name of the generated JUnit XML report. May include a relative or absolute path; relative paths are resolved against the test results directory and missing directories are created. Supports the following placeholders: {pname} (test application name), {pid} (process ID), {asm} (entry assembly name), {tfm} (target framework moniker), {time} (timestamp). Example: MyReport_{tfm}.xml
trans-unit.target: The name of the generated JUnit XML report. May include a relative or absolute path; relative paths are resolved against the test results directory and missing directories are created. Supports the following placeholders: {pname} (test application name), {pid} (process ID), {asm} (entry assembly name), {tfm} (target framework moniker), {time} (timestamp). Example: MyReport_{tfm}.xml

trans-unit.source: '--report-junit-filename' relative paths must stay under the test results directory (e.g. --report-junit-filename nested/myreport.xml)
trans-unit.target: '--report-junit-filename' relative paths must stay under the test results directory (e.g. --report-junit-filename nested/myreport.xml)

trans-unit.source: Produce a JUnit XML report for the current test session
trans-unit.target: Produce a JUnit XML report for the current test session

trans-unit.source: Enable generating a JUnit XML report
trans-unit.target: Enable generating a JUnit XML report
